label: ps
description: Keep process table headers and process rows, dropping empty noise.

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
USER       PID %CPU COMMAND
root         1  0.0 init
node      1234  5.0 node server.js
tests.expected:
USER       PID %CPU COMMAND
root         1  0.0 init
node      1234  5.0 node server.js
